freshness: Current source and test run evidence from implementation branch (gitcode-mcp-live-api-design-agent-20260623T163954Z-gitcode_mcp_live_api_iteration_5_implementation)
mocks_used: httptest.NewServer for external GitCode /api/v5 milestone routes

known_gaps.description: Unrecognized status value silently defaults to 'open' instead of producing schema_decode
known_gaps.resolution: decodeMilestoneStatus default case now returns ErrSchemaDecode with field milestone.state or milestone.status. TestMilestone012bUnrecognizedStatusSchemaDecode added.

known_gaps.description: No negative test for wrong list shape (object instead of array)
known_gaps.detail: Acceptance criteria requires coverage for 'wrong list envelope/object shape'. When list endpoint returns object instead of array, it produces ErrPartialResponse (via json.Decoder.Decode), not ErrSchemaDecode, though the classifier maps partial_response to schema_decode code.

known_gaps.description: Mixed list failure does not include array index in field path
known_gaps.detail: The detailed design specifies array index naming in field paths (e.g. 'milestones[2].title'). The Go JSON decoder wrapping of UnmarshalJSON errors does not append array index context to the field path.
